Text:
The Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival is delighted to welcome Feed Up Warm Up back for their third year with us.

Feed Up Warm Up is a Hitchin-based charity supporting people in food and fuel hardship across the local community. They do important work, and the team behind it bring real warmth to the festival every year.

Catch Shane and Damo across the weekend in their unmistakable orange merch, ready to answer questions about the project and the work they do. Their famous orange shirts are also for sale; pick one up if you like what they stand for.

Find them on site Thursday, Friday and Saturday.

Advance tickets are on sale now:
https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/
or visit the link in our bio.

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #FeedUpWarmUp #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #Charity

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
